# CWE-454 positive: MFA flag set from client POST at bootstrap (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-454-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

var enforceMFA bool

func RegisterBootstrap(db *sql.DB) {
	http.HandleFunc("/bootstrap", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_ = r.ParseForm()
		enforceMFA = r.FormValue("enforce_mfa") == "true"
		_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE settings SET mfa = ?", enforceMFA)
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	})
}
